news.summary: A company based in Columbia, Maryland, Welldoc, has recently been awarded the title of “Best Overall Digital Health Company” by MedTech Breakthrough. This recognition highlights Welldoc's excellence in the digital health sector.
news.headline: Welldoc wins "Best Overall Digital Health Company" for third year in a row at MedTech Breakthrough Awards.

news.summary: AccurKardia, a pioneer in ECG-based diagnostics, revealed that its AccurECGTM software platform won the "Best New Technology Solution for ECG" award at the 9th annual MedTech Breakthrough Awards. This accolade was granted by MedTech Breakthrough, a leading market intelligence firm that acknowledges excellence in the digital health and medical technology sector worldwide. AccurECG's achievement showcases its cutting-edge capabilities in ECG technology and signifies its recognition as an industry leader. This accomplishment highlights AccurKardia's commitment to advancing innovative solutions and signifies its position at the forefront of the healthcare technology industry.
news.headline: AccurKardia's AccurECG wins "Best New Technology Solution for ECG" at 9th Annual MedTech Breakthrough Awards.

news.summary: In New York, Kouper, a health tech platform focused on improving transitions of care, has recently been revealed with $10 million in funding from General Catalyst, 25Madison, and CVS Health Ventures. The company aims to assist the numerous patients moving between healthcare facilities each year in the US. The time post-hospital discharge is identified as the most crucial and delicate phase in a patient's healthcare journey.
news.headline: Kouper, a health tech platform, reveals $10M funding from General Catalyst, 25Madison, CVS Health. Focus on care transitions.
FRANCE PUSHES BACK ON EU RETAIL INVESTOR PROTECTION PROPOSAL

news.summary: Dublin-based company Quantum Health, a prominent provider of consumer healthcare navigation and care coordination services, was recently named the recipient of the "Best Overall Patient Engagement Solution" award by the MedTech Breakthrough Awards. This prestigious accolade is granted by an independent market intelligence organization that identifies leading companies, technologies, and products within the digital health and medical technology industry on a global scale. Quantum Health's innovative approach to patient engagement stood out among competitors, earning them this recognition in a highly competitive field.
news.headline: Quantum Health named "Best Overall Patient Engagement Solution" by MedTech Breakthrough Awards. Top company in global digital health and medical technology market.

news.summary: In Dallas, ISN, a top provider of contractor and supplier information management services, revealed that their AI-driven Toolbox Talks function in the Empower® app secured five Gold Stevie Awards in the 23rd Annual American Business Awards. This feature, which utilizes cutting-edge Generative AI and Natural Language Processing technologies to generate safety briefings tailored to specific contexts, was acknowledged in multiple categories. Specifically, ISN's Toolbox Talks received recognition in areas such as Best Use of AI & Machine Learning.
news.headline: ISN wins 5 Gold Stevie Awards for AI-powered Toolbox Talks in American Business Awards, leading in AI & Machine Learning.

news.summary: Iveda® (NASDAQ: IVDA) from MESA, Arizona, a top player in AI-powered video analytics and IoT smart solutions, revealed that its IvedaCare platform clinched the esteemed "Best IoT Healthcare Platform" title in the 2025 MedTech Breakthrough Awards. This win solidifies Iveda's leading role in AI and IoT advancements in diverse fields like healthcare, security, and smart city technologies. The 2025 MedTech Breakthrough Award highlights the company's excellence in the sector.
news.headline: IvedaCare wins "Best IoT Healthcare Platform" award in 2025 MedTech Breakthrough Awards, solidifying Iveda's AI and IoT innovation leadership.

news.summary: In Westborough, Massachusetts, eClinicalWorks®, the top ambulatory cloud EHR provider, revealed that the Neurology Center of New England, the biggest neurological care facility in the state, has effectively integrated eClinicalWorks Image AI Assistant and healow® Payment Services. The center adopted healow Pay™ and healow Statements in early 2023 and has observed a remarkable 156% increase in overall patient payments during the first quarter of 2024, as opposed to the corresponding period before integration.
news.headline: Neurology Center of New England sees 156% rise in patient payments using eClinicalWorks and healow Payment Services.

news.summary: In an important development for digital infrastructure in West Africa, Phase3 and Sonatel have launched a new terrestrial fiber route spanning 3,500km from Lagos, Nigeria, to Dakar, Senegal. This initiative aims to provide scalable and low-latency connectivity, enabling enhanced cloud and content capacity in the region. This partnership signifies the progression of Phase3's East-West fiber expansion project, which extends the existing Lagos-Accra corridor to Dakar, a prominent digital hub in West Africa.
news.headline: Phase3 and Sonatel launch 3,500km Lagos-to-Dakar fibre route, boosting connectivity in West Africa.

news.summary: The market research report titled "Generative AI in DevOps Market Opportunities and Strategies to 2034" has been recently included in the offerings of ResearchAndMarkets.com. The report delves into the Generative AI in DevOps market, spanning from the years 2019 to 2024 (historic period) and projecting forward to 2029 and 2034 (forecast period). By 2024, the global Generative AI in DevOps market had attained a value of approximately $1.87 billion, showcasing a notable compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 38.80% from 2019.
news.headline: $47.3B Generative AI in DevOps market to 2034 sees $1.87B value in 2024, with 38.80% CAGR growth since 2019 - Asia Pacific and Middle East lead expansion.

news.summary: In San Francisco, Direct Commerce Inc. has made significant strides by introducing two key hires, finalizing a follow-on fundraising effort, and launching an innovative model to enhance AP automation. This new approach intends to foster mutually beneficial partnerships between corporations and their suppliers. Traditionally, supplier finance initiatives have entailed delayed payments and obscured charges within intricate agreements, negatively impacting both parties. Direct Commerce seeks to disrupt this norm and establish a transparent, beneficial relationship.
news.headline: Direct Commerce appoints new execs, secures growth funding and launches a model reshaping enterprise-supplier interactions.

news.summary: A company based in Easton, Pennsylvania, CryoConcepts, LP, has introduced a new product called Skin Clinic - The Ultimate Skin Tag Remover. This FDA-cleared at-home treatment utilizes advanced cryogenic technology that has been utilized by medical experts for more than 30 years. The Skin Clinic aims to provide a safe and effective solution for removing skin tags. This innovative product offers consumers an easy-to-use method for addressing skin tag concerns, promising reliable results.
news.headline: CryoConcepts debuts FDA-cleared Skin Clinic for skin tag removal, using 30 years of cryogenic tech.

news.summary: HopSkipDrive, a tech firm known for enhancing safety, access, and care in student transportation, has recently established a Safety Advisory Council. This group comprises six safety specialists who will advise on youth transportation safety. The council's input will shape HopSkipDrive's future innovations in this area. The company has been a leader in this field for over a decade and continues to prioritize safety in its services.
news.headline: HopSkipDrive forms Safety Advisory Council with six experts to enhance youth transportation safety.

news.summary: Announced from Maumee, Ohio, Larson Manufacturing, a top player in storm doors and screen products for more than 70 years, has introduced their latest innovation - the 60 MT Maximum View storm door. This cutting-edge product is aimed at providing bright, comfortable, and protected home interiors. The door stands out for its easy installation, stylish appearance, performance, and user-friendly features. With the largest solid tempered glass door in their line-up, Larson has set a new standard in the industry. The door incorporates SureLatch magnetic technology for a seamless, secure closing experience.
news.headline: Larson unveils revolutionary 60 MT Maximum View storm door with SureLatch Magnetic Technology, promising comfort and protection.

news.summary: The latest data reveals that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.5%, the lowest it has been in the last five years. This decrease has resulted in 250,000 new jobs being added to the economy in the past month alone. Additionally, the GDP growth for the previous quarter has been reported at 6.2%, exceeding expectations and marking a significant increase from the previous year. Experts attribute this growth to increased consumer spending, particularly in the retail and hospitality sectors. The stock market has also seen a surge, with the main index reaching an all-time high of 35,000 points. The government has announced plans to further stimulate the economy through infrastructure projects and tax incentives for businesses.
news.headline: US stock market rises as Trump discusses trade deal with UK; numbers surge on optimistic news.

news.summary: A company based in New York, Gesher Acquisition Corp. II (Nasdaq: GSHRU), declared that starting May 12, 2025, holders of units from its initial public offering have the option to independently trade the company's Class A ordinary shares and warrants from the units. The separated Class A ordinary shares and warrants will be traded on the Nasdaq Global Market with symbols “GSHR” and “GSHRW”, respectively. Units that remain intact will still be traded on the Nasdaq Global Market under the symbol “GSHRU.”
news.headline: Gesher Acquisition Corp. II will allow separate trading of Class A shares & warrants from May 12, 2025 on Nasdaq Global Market.
